missions.title: HiTL Mission Control - Design-System Day (retrospective): Storage Guardrail -> Consistency Law
missions.status: MISSION CLOSED - SHIPPED (v88 -> v105) - 27 PRs quietly professionalized the whole app: a real storage-migration guardrail, a shared toast primitive, a written ELEMENT CONSISTENCY LAW, and a 53-assert lint that makes it self-enforcing - then the day closed by turning a five-day-old undocumented removal into a registered decision.

missions.title: HiTL Mission Control - Ear-First Night (retrospective): Hear It, Play It, Trust It
missions.status: MISSION CLOSED - SHIPPED (v105 -> v116) - "Hear the scale" landed on both surfaces the same night; jam-discovery, YouTube prefill, and dim-chord classification joined it; then two UAT marathons (fourteen findings, U11 through U24, every one turned around same-session) hardened the whole audio-and-feedback surface before the operator stopped testing at 01:30.
